---
id: memory-index
created: [DATE]
updated: "[DATETIME]"
v: 1.0
type: index
priority: high
status: active
tags:
  - memory
  - memory-system
  - qmd
description: "Master index for the QMD memory system"
---

# Memory Index

Quick reference to all memory entries. Start here for fast lookups.

## Structure (CODE-Aligned)

```
memory/
├── INDEX.qmd          # This file - master index
├── inbox/             # Capture - raw incoming info
├── core/              # Organize - curated knowledge
│   ├── identity.qmd   # Who I am
│   ├── people.qmd     # People I know
│   ├── preferences.qmd # Workflow preferences
│   └── setup.qmd      # Environment setup
├── sessions/          # Distill - daily logs (QMD summaries)
│   └── YYYY-MM-DD.qmd
├── projects/          # Express - outputs and actions
│   └── [project].qmd
├── archive/           # Legacy files
├── learner-sessions/  # Autonomous learning outputs
└── *.md               # Raw session logs (auto-generated)
```

## Core Knowledge (High Priority)

| ID | File | Tags | Summary |
|----|------|------|---------|
| identity-[name] | core/identity.qmd | identity | [Your identity] |
| people | core/people.qmd | person, private | People I know |
| prefs | core/preferences.qmd | preferences | Workflow preferences |
| setup | core/setup.qmd | setup | Environment setup |

## Recent Sessions

| Date | File | Key Events |
|------|------|------------|
| [DATE] | sessions/[DATE].qmd | [Brief summary] |

## Inbox Status

✅ **Empty** - All items processed.

## Lessons Learned

See `memory/lessons.md` for process corrections:
- [DATE]: [Lesson learned]

## YAML Schema

All QMD files follow this schema:

```yaml
---
id: unique-slug           # Required: unique identifier
type: identity|person|preferences|setup|session|project
tags: [array, of, tags]   # Required: categorization
created: YYYY-MM-DD       # Required
updated: "YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS"  # ISO timestamp
version: 1.0              # Track changes
priority: low|medium|high # Load order
status: active|completed|on-hold|draft
access: public|private    # For sensitive data
related: [array, of, files]
summary: "Max 200 chars"  # Brief description
---
```

## Quick Links

- [[core/identity.qmd]] - Who I am
- [[core/people.qmd]] - People directory
- [[core/preferences.qmd]] - Preferences
- [[core/setup.qmd]] - Setup notes
- [[sessions/]] - Session logs
- [[inbox/]] - Capture zone

## Search Tags

- `#identity` - Identity/role info
- `#person` - People cards
- `#setup` - Environment/setup
- `#preferences` - Workflow preferences
- `#session` - Session logs
- `#project` - Active projects
- `#private` - Sensitive data (people.qmd)
